title: hordeanthos lemniscatus
intro: Hordeanthos lemniscatus, also known as Slender Club Moss, is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant with a long history of use, valued for its expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and coughs by loosening mucus in the airways. The medicinal properties of Hordeanthos lemniscatus also make it beneficial for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and tuberculosis, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. This plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures.
